title: Dr. Arnike Redelinghuys vier 21 jaar
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Ever wondered who could...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Ever wondered who could benefit from homeopathy? \"Any patient, young or old, who has any form of acute or chronic pathology or disease that doesn't require direct surgical intervention,\" answers Dr Arnike Redelinghuys, clinical and integrative homeopathic practitioner right here in Voorbaai, Mossel Bay.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Ever wondered who could benefit from homeopathy? \"Any patient, young or old, who has any form of acute or chronic pathology or disease that doesn't require direct surgical intervention,\" answers Dr Arnike Redelinghuys, clinical and integrative homeopathic practitioner right here in Voorbaai, Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gevestig in gemeenskap","html":"Gevestig in gemeenskap"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In Augustus vanjaar vier Redelinghuys se praktyk sy 'mondigwording' en dus meer as twee dekades se diens aan Mosselbaai."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sy het haar praktyk aanvanklik in 2004 in Da Nova geopen, maar later in 2015 na Sable Office Park, op die hoek van Louis Fourie- en Rooken Smithstraat, verskuif.","html":"Sy het haar praktyk aanvanklik in 2004 in Da Nova geopen, maar later in 2015 na Sable Office Park, op die hoek van Louis Fourie- en Rooken Smithstraat, verskuif."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Die 21 jaar se sukses skryf sy toe aan God se seën. \"Dit is ook 'n bewys dat homeopatie werk. Pasiënte voel beter en word gesond en vertel dan vir familie en vriende.\"","html":"Die 21 jaar se sukses skryf sy toe aan God se seën. \"Dit is ook 'n bewys dat homeopatie werk. Pasiënte voel beter en word gesond en vertel dan vir familie en vriende.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"What is homeopathy?To those unsure of what exactly homeopathy is and what a homeopath does, Redelinghuys explains it simply: \"Homeopathy is an individualised, holistic system of medicine that focuses on the principle of 'like cures like' and it stimulates the body's own healing capacity to bring about health resolution. I strive to identify and treat the root cause of disease as well as preventing it.","html":"What is homeopathy?
To those unsure of what exactly homeopathy is and what a homeopath does, Redelinghuys explains it simply: \"Homeopathy is an individualised, holistic system of medicine that focuses on the principle of 'like cures like' and it stimulates the body's own healing capacity to bring about health resolution. I strive to identify and treat the root cause of disease as well as preventing it."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Besides conventional diagnostic techniques, I use nutritional live blood analysis as a supplementary diagnostic technique.","html":"\"Besides conventional diagnostic techniques, I use nutritional live blood analysis as a supplementary diagnostic technique."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I use the Wahls Protocol for auto-immune diseases and TRE [tension and trauma release exercises] to equip patients with tools to manage daily stress.\"","html":"\"I use the Wahls Protocol for auto-immune diseases and TRE [tension and trauma release exercises] to equip patients with tools to manage daily stress.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Die dokter agter die praktyk\"Ek het 'n meestersgraad in homeopatie aan die Universiteit van Johannesburg verwerf en in 2004 van Kempton Park na Mosselbaai verhuis. Ek is die voorsitter van Mosselbaai se multidissiplinêre groep vir voortgesette professionele ontwikkeling [CPD] en ook die Homeopatiese Vereniging van Suid-Afrika se verteenwoordiger vir die Kaapse streek.","html":"Die dokter agter die praktyk
\"Ek het 'n meestersgraad in homeopatie aan die Universiteit van Johannesburg verwerf en in 2004 van Kempton Park na Mosselbaai verhuis. Ek is die voorsitter van Mosselbaai se multidissiplinêre groep vir voortgesette professionele ontwikkeling [CPD] en ook die Homeopatiese Vereniging van Suid-Afrika se verteenwoordiger vir die Kaapse streek."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Ek het spesiale belangstelling in allergieë, spysverteringsiektes en autoimmuunsiektes.","html":"\"Ek het spesiale belangstelling in allergieë, spysverteringsiektes en autoimmuunsiektes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Verder is ek 'n trotse ma, en my gunsteling-ontspanningstyd is wanneer ek kamp en in Wildernis gaan stap of roei.\"","html":"\"Verder is ek 'n trotse ma, en my gunsteling-ontspanningstyd is wanneer ek kamp en in Wildernis gaan stap of roei.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr. Arnike Redelinghuys","html":"Dr. Arnike Redelinghuys"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
